steps.title: Read the sunset image
steps.content: The sun is already down, but its presence can still be detected in the fiery light in the sky. In this context, manifest means apparent to the senses rather than physically located.

steps.title: Reject wrong senses
steps.content: Choice A means situated, which is about location. Choice C means achieved or made real, and Choice D means fading. The sentence instead describes the hidden sun becoming visible through its effects. The answer is B.
